name: Aegis Protocol
description: AI Agent Skill Marketplace on Solana

skills.name: search-operators
skills.description: Search 452 AI agent skill operators by capability, category, price, or trust score

parameters.category: Filter by category (e.g. security, defi, code-review)
parameters.sortBy: Sort by: trust, price, invocations, newest

skills.name: get-operator
skills.description: Get full details for a specific operator including trust breakdown

skills.name: invoke-operator
skills.description: Invoke a skill operator with x402 USDC payment on Solana. Returns HTTP 402 with payment instructions on first call. Pay USDC to the specified wallet, then retry with X-PAYMENT header containing the Solana transaction signature.

skills.name: get-trust-score
skills.description: Get 5-dimension trust breakdown for any operator

skills.name: list-categories
skills.description: List all operator categories with counts
